title: ANC - changes are present after putting the app in the background
scenario: ANC settings persist when Poly Studio Mobile app is backgrounded and then brought to foreground
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC.
4. Set ANC to a specific mode (e.g., High, Low, or Adaptive).
5. Press the Home button or recent apps button to put the Poly Studio Mobile app in the background.
6. Wait a few seconds, then bring the app back to the foreground by tapping the app icon or selecting it from the recent apps list.
7. Navigate back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC.
expected: The ANC setting should remain unchanged and display the same mode that was selected before putting the app in the background.
